overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player character moves from a neon-lit covered walkway along a waterfront promenade, ascends illuminated stairs, and crosses a busy street with heavy rainfall and reflective wet surfaces throughout the journey.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered bar walkway transitioning to open waterfront promenade

events.description: exits covered bar area with checkered floor into open rain-soaked promenade
moves from sheltered neon lighting into open rainy night with reduced overhead cover

agents.ego_description: walking along a covered walkway with purple neon lights, passing by a bar with checkered floor and glass railings

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at the bar counter inside the neon-lit establishment

entered.detail: bar with purple neon lighting and yellow checkered floor pattern visible through glass
transparent glass railing with chrome posts separating walkway from lower level
large illuminated advertisement screens displaying colorful graphics on building walls
tall palm trees lining the waterfront area in the background
illuminated red and white vending machine on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a covered walkway adjacent to a neon-lit bar with a distinctive checkered floor. The player moves forward along a glass-railed walkway, passing digital billboards and a vending machine, transitioning from the sheltered area into the open rain with palm trees visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront boardwalk with seating and large advertising displays

events.description: slight turn to the right while continuing along the wooden boardwalk
passing by seated NPCs on yellow illuminated benches near the Nicola billboard

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet wooden boardwalk, passing yellow benches and large digital billboards while rain continues to fall

notable_agents.action: person sitting on yellow bench facing the large billboard advertisement

entered.detail: wet wooden planks reflecting purple and blue neon lights from surrounding buildings
large white advertisement display with 'NICOLA' text and beverage imagery
illuminated yellow seating benches along the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide waterfront boardwalk with wet wooden decking reflecting the vibrant neon lights. The player passes by the prominent Nicola billboard and yellow benches where NPCs are seated, with palm trees now visible on the left side as the walkway curves gently.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza area with illuminated staircase leading to upper street level

events.description: begins ascending the illuminated staircase with pink and orange lighting
transitions from concrete plaza to stairway ascent with neon-lit risers

agents.ego_description: walking across the concrete plaza and ascending the neon-lit stairs toward the upper street level

notable_agents.action: person walking up the stairs ahead of the player character

entered.detail: open concrete area with puddles reflecting pink and purple neon lights
staircase with pink neon lighting on walls and orange illuminated edges on steps
stairs with bright yellow illuminated risers creating a glowing pathway upward

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the wooden boardwalk onto a concrete plaza area, approaching a dramatically illuminated staircase with pink and yellow neon lighting. The segment features the ascent of these glowing stairs while rain continues to fall, with a palm tree visible to the right and skyscrapers looming ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane city street with crosswalk and vehicle traffic

events.description: crossing the street at crosswalk as futuristic vehicles pass by on the wet asphalt
continuing forward across the multi-lane road while navigating around moving traffic

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet asphalt street at a crosswalk, navigating between moving vehicles in the rain

notable_agents.action: black truck driving down the street with headlights on, passing the crosswalk
blue car moving along the road in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wet asphalt road with multiple lanes reflecting the bright city lights and neon signs
yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road surface
futuristic cars and trucks with headlights illuminating the rainy street
tall glass buildings covered in large digital advertisements and neon signage
tall black pole with traffic signals and attached signage

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the player emerges onto a busy multi-lane city street with wet asphalt reflecting the surrounding neon lights. The character crosses the road at a marked crosswalk while futuristic vehicles pass by, with massive skyscrapers covered in digital billboards towering on both sides of the street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered neon walkway through a rain-soaked waterfront and up into the heart of a towering futuristic metropolis. It begins inside a covered area with a checkered floor, moving past digital billboards and a vending machine before transitioning from the shelter into the open rain. As the camera emerges, the scene opens onto a wide waterfront boardwalk of wet wooden decking that reflects vibrant neon lights and passes by yellow benches and palm trees. The path then shifts from the wooden decking to a concrete plaza, leading the camera up a dramatically illuminated staircase glowing in pink and yellow hues. Finally, the ascent concludes as the camera emerges onto a busy multi-lane city street, crossing wet asphalt amidst passing futuristic vehicles and massive skyscrapers covered in digital billboards.
